name: Brazilian Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Head mixed romaine lettuce, washed well, and gently patted dry
1 Can (14-oz) hearts of palm, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a serving platter with large lettuce leaves.
2. Break the remaining lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place over the top of the large leaves.
3. Arrange tomato slices, overlapping down the center of the lettuce bed, tucking onion slices in between the tomatoes.
4. Place sliced hearts of palm next to the tomatoes.
5. Add rows of olives and garbanzo beans.
6. Serve with a sprinkle of parsley and olive oil or other favorite dressing on the side.
